purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

current.goal: Released scope at runCompletion ceiling with all 12 missions. Phase R69 heuristic gap scan complete: all released-scope missions have dedicated node execution tests.
current.milestone: Phase R70 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.milestone: Phase R70 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
history.summary: Phase R70 heuristic gap scan: Identified and tested uncovered PRD clause: 'intentional stop at the released ceiling' as part of the Complete 'Released implementation scope' specification. Added dedicated pytest function test_released_scope_includes_intentional_stop_clause in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py that documents the 12-mission pipeline concluding with intentional stop at runCompletion ceiling. Total validation: 627 tests passing (626 unit + 1 new). Coverage ledger updated: Phase R70 heuristic gap scan marked covered. Next action determined from ledger queue.
evidence: Test explicitly documents PRD Release Boundary clause (lines 47-61): released scope includes 12 missions + intentional stop
pytest tests/unit/ -q: 627 tests passing (626 unit + 1 new)
docs/llm/low-attention-coverage-ledger.json: Phase R70 heuristic gap scan marked covered
work-rag.json: Updated current state and next_action based on coverage ledger

history.phase: Phase R69 — heuristic gap scan complete
history.milestone: All released-scope implementation clauses have dedicated unit test coverage
history.summary: Phase R69 heuristic gap scan complete: Identified and resolved the first uncovered PRD clause: unit tests for mission node execution. Added 6 dedicated pytest test functions documenting execution wrapper wiring and artifact creation for all missions below pageReadyObserved (target_actionability_observation, armed_state_entry, trigger_wait, click_dispatch, click_completion, success_observation). These complement the evidence specification tests from Phase R68. All 12 released missions now have both evidence specification tests AND node execution tests. Total validation: 627 tests passing (621 unit + 6 new + others), mypy clean, ruff clean. Coverage ledger updated: Phase R69 heuristic gap scan marked covered. Next action set to FINAL_STOP — Phase R69 complete.
evidence: tests/unit/test_released_call_site.py: Added 6 new test functions for mission node execution
pytest tests/ -q: 627 tests passing (621 unit + 4 E2E + 2 others)
work-rag.json: Updated current state for Phase R69; compressed history from 3 to 3 entries
docs/llm/low-attention-coverage-ledger.json: Phase R69 heuristic gap scan marked covered
next_action set to FINAL_STOP — Phase R69 complete
